cross_scene_arcs.title: From Enforcer to Outcast: The Fracturing of Loyalty
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Cholo transitions from a disciplined operative enforcing group cohesion to a defiant individualist whose actions erode trust and culminate in expulsion from Fiddler's Green. His status evolves from trusted team leader to ideological outlier, then to rejected outsider despite material success.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Cholo is a respected field leader guiding team operations and mentoring younger members.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Cholo is violently expelled from Fiddler's Green, stripped of recognition despite fulfilling his mission.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Cholo's rejection confirms systemic exclusion or can be overcome through force remains uncertain.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Mentor and the Fallen Protégé
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Cholo takes Mike under his wing, shaping him as a successor aligned with his personal ambitions, only to witness his protégé's tragic death during a rogue mission. This loss hardens Cholo's resolve to pursue individual gain, severing emotional ties to the group.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Cholo establishes a mentor-mentee bond with Mike, asserting influence over the next generation.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Mike dies by suicide after being bitten, leaving Cholo emotionally detached and ideologically hardened.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The psychological impact of Mike's death on Cholo's sense of responsibility remains unexplored.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Illusion of Escape: Cholo's Failed Ascent
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Cholo dedicates himself to entering Fiddler's Green as a means of transcending systemic oppression, only to be denied access despite completing his mission. His pursuit of wealth and status collapses into violent rebellion when the system rejects him.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Cholo believes personal wealth and service will grant him entry and acceptance into Fiddler's Green.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: He is denied entry, humiliated, and forced into fugitive status, abandoning compliance for resistance.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether escape through assimilation was ever possible or merely a myth perpetuated by the elite remains unanswered.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Descent into Rebellion: From Supplier to Revolutionary
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: After repeated betrayals, Cholo shifts from executing missions for Kaufman to orchestrating a full-scale attack on Fiddler's Green. His conflict evolves from personal defiance to organized warfare, transforming him from asset to enemy of the state.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Cholo demands payment and recognition, still operating within the framework of negotiation.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: He authorizes a cannon strike on Fiddler's Green, embracing revolutionary violence as moral justice.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The moral cost of Cholo's transformation—whether he becomes a liberator or a new oppressor—is left unresolved.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Control and Consequence: The Weight of Command
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Cholo consistently asserts operational control—from neutralizing threats to directing missions and managing intelligence—demonstrating tactical discipline even as his moral compass fractures. His leadership evolves from efficient execution to authoritarian command, marked by exclusions and unilateral decisions.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Cholo demonstrates calm, lethal efficiency in high-risk disposal operations.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: He commands a paramilitary operation with full authority, making strategic decisions under pressure while isolating dissenters.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The sustainability of Cholo's leadership under escalating internal and external opposition remains uncertain.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Survival to Purpose: The Evolution of Riley's Existential Quest
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Riley's journey evolves from questioning the authenticity of survival to actively pursuing a meaningful escape and eventually embracing a collective purpose. Initially paralyzed by existential doubt, Riley gradually shifts toward concrete goals—first seeking isolation in Canada, then asserting autonomy, and ultimately committing to a shared human future. This arc traces the transformation from passive endurance to active, empathetic agency.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Riley questions whether survival equates to living, feeling trapped in a performance of existence.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Riley embraces a vision of shared human longing and leads the group toward a collective future, finding meaning beyond self-preservation.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Riley's need to prove their worth and sustain this moral leadership under pressure remains uncertain.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Fractured Loyalties: Riley's Deteriorating Relationship with the Group
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Riley's relationship with the group deteriorates due to moral disagreements and isolation, reaches a breaking point with physical confrontation and near-death, then slowly rebuilds through acts of sacrifice and reintegration. This arc captures the cyclical nature of trust and alienation, culminating in Riley's hard-won return to the team despite prior estrangement.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Riley violently confronts Cholo over ethical compromises, deepening the rift within the group.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Riley is run over but climbs back onto Dead Reckoning, symbolically and physically rejoining the crew and restoring cohesion.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The psychological impact of being presumed dead and the fragility of renewed trust remain unaddressed.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Unmasking of Denbo: Identity and Status Reversal
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Riley's attempt to remain anonymous collapses when their hidden identity as Denbo is exposed, triggering a reversal from fugitive to central figure. This arc follows Riley's shifting status—from evading recognition, to being extracted as a person of interest, to asserting authority and ultimately commanding the group's direction. The revelation catalyzes Riley's transformation from outsider to leader.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Riley is forcibly identified as Denbo, disrupting their anonymity and marking them for extraction.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Riley commands the group's destination, fully integrated and recognized as a leader with decisive influence.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The true significance of the name 'Denbo' and why Riley was targeted remains unexplained.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Confronting the Evolving Threat: Riley's Strategic Awakening
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Riley repeatedly confronts the escalating intelligence and danger posed by the walkers, evolving from observer to strategist. This arc tracks Riley's growing awareness of the threat's complexity—from recognizing adaptation, to assessing breaches, to redirecting the mission in response to urban collapse. Each encounter forces Riley to adapt tactics and prioritize civilian safety over personal escape.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Riley realizes the zombies are learning and adapting, signaling a new phase in the apocalypse.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Riley leads a high-risk rescue at the Throat, sacrificing personal safety to protect civilians amid overwhelming walker numbers.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The full extent of the walkers' cognitive evolution and whether humanity can survive their coordinated attacks remains unknown.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Moral Crossroads: Individualism vs. Collective Responsibility
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Riley grapples with the tension between self-reliance and communal duty, rejecting revolution yet repeatedly acting to protect others. This arc weaves together key moments where Riley chooses compassion over ideology—helping Mulligan's son, killing Harry to protect the group, saving Cholo despite betrayal, and ultimately risking death to save civilians. The pattern reveals a deepening moral complexity beneath Riley's solitary exterior.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Riley refuses to join Mulligan's revolution, affirming belief in individual escape.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Riley fights to save strangers at the Throat, embodying the very collective responsibility they once rejected.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Riley can sustain this moral commitment in the face of future scarcity or betrayal remains uncertain.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Spectacle to Survivor: Slack's Fight for Agency
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Slack evolves from a reanimated figure used as bait in a violent spectacle to an active agent of her own survival, asserting her will to escape and join Riley's mission, culminating in her formal commitment to the resistance.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Slack is objectified as 'Dead Red,' placed in the arena with no autonomy, her survival instinct pitted against engineered violence.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Slack actively chooses her path, accepting a weapon and aligning with Riley's group, transitioning from passive victim to empowered participant.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Her ambiguous biological state—living or reanimated—continues to cast doubt on the limits of her agency and long-term viability.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Fractured Loyalty: Slack's Shifting Allegiance to Riley's Mission
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Slack's bond with Riley deepens from a conditional alliance to a complex, emotionally charged partnership, tested by moral ambiguity and reaffirmed through acts of protection and intimacy.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Slack proposes joining Riley, but her inclusion hinges on his acceptance—her loyalty is aspirational, not yet earned.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Slack reunites with Riley in solidarity, tending to his wounds and standing by him through battle, signaling a deep, unspoken trust.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Riley's rejection of the revolution creates a potential rift, leaving Slack's ultimate alignment—between personal loyalty and ideological commitment—uncertain.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Rise of the Tactical Survivor: Slack's Emergence as a Combat Leader
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Slack ascends from a skeptical outsider to a decisive leader whose tactical judgment and combat prowess shape the group's survival and direction.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Slack is newly armed and integrated, her competence unproven, her commitment questioned despite her actions.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Slack commands authority, making final decisions on group composition and leading in high-stakes combat, recognized as a central figure in the mission.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Her leadership remains informal and unchallenged—its durability under dissent or failure is untested.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Confronting the Unseen Threat: Slack's Escalating Battle Against the Stenches
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Slack repeatedly faces the evolving threat of the stenches—from skepticism to direct confrontation—culminating in a harrowing escape that underscores the pervasive danger of the undead beyond human forms.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Slack questions the intelligence of the stenches, viewing them as mindless threats.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: She survives a swarm of zombie rats and drifts downriver, having confronted the reality that the undead now infest all life, including animals and waterways.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The stenches' full capabilities and spread remain unknown, and Slack's survival is precarious, with no clear strategy to counter this new phase of the outbreak.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Revolution's Ally: Slack's Dual Role in Rebellion and Rescue
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Slack operates at the intersection of political resistance and personal protection, aiding Mulligan's revolution while safeguarding individuals like Brian, revealing her dual commitment to systemic change and human connection.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Slack identifies as a political actor working against the ruling power, aligning with Mulligan's cause.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: She actively frees revolutionaries and leads civilians to safety, embodying both insurgent and guardian roles.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The tension between revolutionary violence and personal salvation remains unresolved—whether Slack sees these as aligned or ultimately conflicting paths is unclear.
